'''zamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cackhandedly|cackhandedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cackhandedly|cackhandedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zamate|zamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zamatesher|zamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zamatesherĂ«m|zamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zamatero|zamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zamateshĂ«|zamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zamateshĂ«m|zamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizamatero|gokizamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizamateshĂ«|gokizamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizamateshĂ«m|gokizamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozamankerom|gozamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozamankeshĂ«|gozamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozamankeshĂ«m|gozamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozamankeya|gozamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zamaterom|zamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zamatemu|zamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zamateya|zamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizamaterom|gokizamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizamatemu|gokizamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizamateya|gokizamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zamamate|zamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zamamatesher|zamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zamamatesherĂ«m|zamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zamamatero|zamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zamamateshĂ«|zamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zamamateshĂ«m|zamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizamamatero|gokizamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizamamateshĂ«|gokizamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizamamateshĂ«m|gokizamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozamamankerom|gozamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozamamankeshĂ«|gozamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozamamankeshĂ«m|gozamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozamamankeya|gozamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zamamaterom|zamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zamamatemu|zamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zamamateya|zamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizamamaterom|gokizamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizamamatemu|gokizamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizamamateya|gokizamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠte|zĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠtesher|zĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠtero|zĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠmĂŠtero|gokizĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠterom|zĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠtemu|zĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠmĂŠteya|zĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠmĂŠterom|gokizĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠmĂŠteya|gokizĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafmafte|zafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafmaftesher|zafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafmaftesherĂ«m|zafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafmaftero|zafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafmafteshĂ«|zafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafmafteshĂ«m|zafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafmaftero|gokizafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafmafteshĂ«|gokizafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafmafteshĂ«m|gokizafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafmafnkerom|gozafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafmafnkeshĂ«|gozafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafmafnkeshĂ«m|gozafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafmafnkeya|gozafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafmafterom|zafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafmaftemu|zafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafmafteya|zafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafmafterom|gokizafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafmaftemu|gokizafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafmafteya|gokizafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
